'''''Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed'': Prima Official Game Guide''' was a strategy book for the [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] Expansion pack by [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] and was released on [[November 2]], [[2004]]. The guide detailed coverage of the game. It contained information on the three new space professions, Ithorian and Sullustan, new race specs as well as information on the eight new space zone maps and Shipwright profession tree, with schematics.

{{Book-stub}}

==Continuity==
The section on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] provides some historical context for the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] population, which reuses some text directly from the DataBank in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.
